user.title: Weather Station Setup
user.description: Select the sensors for your forecasting model.

data_description.pressure_sensor: Select your barometric pressure sensor (absolute or sea level pressure)
data_description.wind_sensor: Optional: select your wind direction sensor (in degrees)
data_description.temperature_sensor: Optional: used for accurate sea level pressure correction
data_description.use_sea_level_correction: Enable if using an absolute pressure sensor and located above sea level
data_description.location: Click on the map to select your weather station location for altitude calculation

abort.already_configured: This weather station is already configured

init.title: Adjust Sensors
init.description: Update the sensors used for Zambretti and Sager calculations.

data_description.pressure_sensor: Select your barometric pressure sensor (absolute or sea level pressure)
data_description.wind_sensor: Optional: select your wind direction sensor (in degrees)
data_description.temperature_sensor: Optional: used for accurate sea level pressure correction

data_description.location: Click on the map to select your weather station location for altitude calculation
